common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

Use this filed to indicate whether this merchant is upgraded to CBSC, including CNSC and KRSC.
response_params.name: is_upgraded_cbsc

response_params.description: Shopee’s unique identifier for a merchant. If the shop won't under any merchant, then the value will be null.
response_params.name: merchant_id

response_params.description:
Use this field to indicate the fulfillment type of current shop, the applicable values: 


- Pure - FBS Shop: Single mode, refer to Local/CB shops which only have Shopee official warehouse stock, orders are fulfilled by Shopee from Shopee official warehouse; 


- Pure - 3PF Shop: Single mode, refer to CB shops which only have local seller warehouse stock, orders are fulfilled by seller from local seller warehouse via local logistics channels; 


- PFF - FBS Shop: 

1) Hybird mode, refer to Local shops which have both Shopee official warehouse stock and local seller warehouse stock, orders can be fulfilled by Shopee from Shopee official warehouse and can also fulfilled by seller from local seller warehouse via local logistics channels; 

2) Hybrid mode, refer to CB shops which have both Shopee official warehouse stock and CB seller warehouse stock, orders can be fulfilled by Shopee from Shopee official warehouse and can also fulfilled by seller from CB seller warehouse via CB logistics channels; 


- PFF - 3PF Shop: Hybrid mode, refer to CB shops which have both local seller warehouse stock and CB seller warehouse stock, orders can be fulfilled by seller from local seller warehouse via local logistics channels and can also fulfilled by seller from CB seller warehouse via CB logistics channels; 


- LFF Hybrid Shop: Hybrid mode, refer to CB shops which have 3 types of stock: FBS stock (Shopee official warehouse stock), 3PF stock (CB seller own stock in the local market) and CB SLS stock (CB seller own stock in CN/HK/KR);


- Others


- Unknown: Returned when obtaining shop_fulfillment_flag information fails
response_params.name: shop_fulfillment_flag

response_params.description: Identifies if the current shop is a Local Shop linked to Cross Border Direct Shop.
response_params.name: is_main_shop

response_params.description: Identifies if the current shop is a Cross Border Direct Shop.
response_params.name: is_direct_shop

response_params.description: Returns the Shop ID of the Local Shop linked to the Cross Border Direct Shop.
response_params.name: linked_main_shop_id

response_params.description: Returns the list of Cross Border Direct Shops linked to the Local Shop.
response_params.name: linked_direct_shop_list

children.description: Shop ID of the Cross Border Direct Shop.
children.name: direct_shop_id

children.description: Shop Region of the Cross Border Direct Shop.
children.name: direct_shop_region

response_params.description:
Use this filed to indicate if the shop is in 1-AWB whitelist. 


If is_one_awb return true, please use new AWB size (10cm x 15cm thermal paper) to print AWB. For more details, please refer to: https://open.shopee.com/announcements/1138?category=3&is_top=false
response_params.name: is_one_awb

response_params.description: Indicates whether the current shop is a Mart Shop.
response_params.name: is_mart_shop

response_params.description: Indicates whether the current shop is an Outlet Shop.
response_params.name: is_outlet_shop

response_params.description: (Only returned when requesting an Outlet Shop) Refers to the Mart Shop ID this Outlet belongs to.
response_params.name: mart_shop_id

response_params.description: (Only returned when requesting a Mart Shop) List of Outlet Shop IDs under this Mart Shop.
response_params.name: outlet_shop_info_list

response_params.description:
(Only returned when requesting a Mart or Outlet Shop)

Indicates the structure type of the Mart or Outlet shop. Applicable values are: normal_mart_shop, warehouse_mart_shop, normal_outlet_shop, warehouse_outlet_shop
response_params.name: mart_outlet_structure_type

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/shop/get_shop_info?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

update_log_list.content: support mart/outlet shop type in response
Add new fields to enable determination if a shop is operating under the Cross Border Direct Selling model
add "LFF Hybrid Shop" option for "shop_fulfillment_flag" response parameter
